entryExit.text:
CRH plc (CRH) — Entry / Exit Framework

Accumulate: $103.74–$112.0 — pullback zone within the 52-week range. The stock is attractively priced relative to the recent move.
Stop-loss: $77.52 — a close below the 52-week low would signal fundamental deterioration.
Target 1: $111.82 — mean reversion toward the midpoint of the 52-week range. Near-term catalyst needed to confirm momentum.
Target 2: $138.13 — above the 52-week high on sustained volume. Only appropriate for position-initiation with conviction.

sources.marketData: Live quote data sourced via DYOR HQ data pipeline (Google Sheets + Yahoo Finance). Fields include price, market capitalisation, 52-week range, P/E, EPS, and volume.
sources.companyFilings: Public company filings, regulatory announcements, investor presentations, and RNS where referenced in the analysis.
